name: aph2-access-system
description: APH2 Access System - door access control (Bun + SQLite + UHPPOTE).

scripts.client:build: bun build client/src/main.js --outdir client/dist && tailwindcss -i client/src/styles.css -o client/dist/styles.css && cp client/src/index.html client/dist/
scripts.client:build:prod: bun build client/src/main.js --outdir client/dist --minify && tailwindcss -i client/src/styles.css -o client/dist/styles.css --minify && cp client/src/index.html client/dist/
